summary: #40 .env.example: documented 8 remediation env vars (2 more than issue listed). DoD parity 0 missing. Docs-only; heavy Tier-1 gated by CI. Pre-existing prettier(src,printWidth100) advisory + 43 md files noted, not introduced.

#41 translated remediation namespace x26 locales (Google->OpenAI; Systran 401/DeepL disabled). Parity 231/231, placeholders 0-mismatch, RTL/CJK in target script. Residual identical=legit loanwords; en-GB approx en. MT 'Fleet' literal caveat noted.
